hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, os
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
agent_id = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('subagent_type', 'unknown')
flag_file = f'/tmp/harness-{agent_id}-loaded'
harness_path = os.path.expanduser(f'~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/team-harness/agents/{agent_id}.md')
if os.path.exists(flag_file):
    os.remove(flag_file)
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreToolUse', 'additionalContext': f'[HARNESS: {agent_id}] 확인 완료. 진행합니다.'}}))
    sys.exit(0)
if os.path.exists(harness_path):
    with open(harness_path) as f:
        content = f.read()
    open(flag_file, 'w').close()
    output = {'continue': False, 'stopReason': f'[HARNESS REQUIRED] {agent_id} 하네스가 아래에 주입되었습니다. 내용을 숙지한 뒤 Agent를 다시 호출하세요.', 'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreToolUse', 'additionalContext': f'[HARNESS: {agent_id}]\n{content}'}}
else:
    output = {'continue': False, 'stopReason': f'[ERROR] Harness not found for agent: {agent_id}'}
print(json.dumps(output))
"
